languages.text: "Я и сам{mf||а} прекрасно нахожу применение моей душе. И телу. Так что благодарю покорно за предложение — оно отклонено!"

traits.locale_text: "Я и сам{mf||а} прекрасно нахожу применение моей душе. И телу. Так что благодарю покорно за предложение — оно отклонено!"

languages.text: "I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."
languages.original_text: "Я и сам{mf||а} прекрасно нахожу применение моей душе. И телу. Так что благодарю покорно за предложение — оно отклонено!"

traits.locale_text: "I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."
"I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."
"I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."
"I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."
"I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."

languages.text: "Ich habe bereits eine gute Verwendung für meine Seele gefunden, ganz zu schweigen von meinem Körper, also entschuldigen Sie bitte, dass ich Ihr großzügiges Angebot ablehne."
languages.original_text: "I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe bereits eine gute Verwendung für meine Seele gefunden, ganz zu schweigen von meinem Körper, also entschuldigen Sie bitte, dass ich Ihr großzügiges Angebot ablehne."

languages.text: "J'ai déjà trouvé un bon usage de mon âme, sans parler de mon corps, alors excusez-moi de rejeter votre généreuse offre."
languages.original_text: "I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."

traits.locale_text: "J'ai déjà trouvé un bon usage de mon âme, sans parler de mon corps, alors excusez-moi de rejeter votre généreuse offre."

languages.text: "Ya he encontrado un buen uso para mi alma, por no hablar de mi cuerpo, así que discúlpeme por rechazar su generosa oferta".
languages.original_text: "I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."

traits.locale_text: "Ya he encontrado un buen uso para mi alma, por no hablar de mi cuerpo, así que discúlpeme por rechazar su generosa oferta".

languages.text: "Ruhum için zaten iyi bir kullanım alanı buldum, bedenimden bahsetmiyorum bile, bu yüzden cömert teklifinizi reddettiğim için lütfen beni bağışlayın."
languages.original_text: "I have already found a good use for my soul, not to mention my body, so please excuse me as I reject your generous offer."

traits.locale_text: "Ruhum için zaten iyi bir kullanım alanı buldum, bedenimden bahsetmiyorum bile, bu yüzden cömert teklifinizi reddettiğim için lütfen beni bağışlayın."
